scripts.dev: concurrently -k -n server,web,electron -c green,cyan,magenta "npm run dev:server" "npm run dev:web" "npm run dev:electron"
scripts.dev:electron: wait-on tcp:8080 http://localhost:5173 && cross-env NODE_OPTIONS= VITE_DEV_SERVER_URL=http://localhost:5173 AIRELIA_API_URL=http://localhost:8080 electron .
scripts.build: npm --workspace @airelia/web run build && npm --workspace @airelia/server run build
